content.rendered:
On this page, you can find an overview of all articles related to colloquial Finnish grammar. You can read more about spoken language vocabulary here.

Colloquial Finnish language grammar

FINNISH SPOKEN LANGUAGE GRAMMAR

  • Typical features of colloquial Finnish
  • Spoken language pronunciation
  • Personal pronouns: mä mää mie
  • Demonstrative pronouns: tää toi se
  • Verb conjugation in spoken language
  • Third person plural verb conjugation: ne puhuu puhekieltä
  • Third infinitive: Menen nukkuun
  • Necessity sentences: Mun tarttee syödä
  • Spoken language passive: Me opiskellaan suomee
  • Questions in spoken Finnish: Opiskeleksä suomee?
  • Spoken language numbers: Seittemän pientä kiliä
  • Syntax of spoken Finnish
  • The South Ostrobothnian dialect

excerpt.rendered: On this page, you can find an overview of all articles related to colloquial Finnish grammar. You can read more about spoken language vocabulary here.
